channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Red Bull picks Liam Lawson as Max Verstappen's F1 teammate in 2025
item.description: MILTON KEYNES, England (AP) — Liam Lawson will partner world champion Max Verstappen at Red Bull in 2025, the Formula 1 team said on Thursday. Lawson, a New Zealander, replaces Sergio Perez, who was dropped on Wednesday after months of poor results.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vandy QB Diego Pavia wins injunction allowing him to play D-I football in 2025
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Diego Pavia reacted to a federal judge granting his preliminary injunction Wednesday allowing the quarterback to play the 2025 season the same way he celebrated upsetting then-No. 1 Alabama in October.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Brr! Winter adds an old-school challenge to the CFP. Visiting teams insist it's 'snow' problem
item.description: Asked if playing in near-freezing weather at Ohio State might pose a challenge for his team, Tennessee coach Josh Heupel quickly noted that it wouldn’t be the Volunteers’ first rodeo with the cold.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cardinals' eight-time All-Star blocks potential trade to Astros: report
item.description: Nolan Arenado reportedly did not waive his no-trade clause after the St. Louis Cardinals agreed on a deal that would have sent him to the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: La Jolla 55, Army-Navy 47
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in La Jolla with the Vikings hosting Army-Navy from Carlsbad. Great game that went right down to the wire, La Jolla won 52-47. Vikings were lead by Leo Hawkinson with 16. Warriors were lead by Yanler Ramos game high 26 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: The Yankees have moved on quickly after losing Juan Soto. Roki Sasaki could be next
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In pivoting to Plan B after losing Juan Soto, Brian Cashman went after a familiar name in Cody Bellinger. “I acquired his dad back in the day. Now I acquired his son,” the New York Yankees general manager said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Exclusive: Pro tennis player Jenson Brooksby talks about living with autism
item.description: American professional tennis player Jenson Brooksby tells The Associated Press he was diagnosed with autism spectrum disorder when he was nonverbal at about 2 1/2 years old.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bucs quarterback Baker Mayfield named Offensive Player of the Week
item.description: It was announced on Wednesday that Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield has been named NFC Offensive Player of the Week.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark's jersey number to be retired by Iowa
item.description: The Iowa Hawkeyes will retire Caitlin Clark's jersey No. 22 in February, honoring one of the most accomplished careers in college sports history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark's No. 22 to be retired during February ceremony at Iowa's Carver-Hawkeye Arena
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — No Iowa Hawkeyes women's basketball player will wear Caitlin Clark's No. 22 again. The number will be retired in a ceremony Feb. 2 at Carver-Hawkeye Arena, the Iowa athletic department announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Durbin faces backlash for remark on trans inclusion in women's sports
item.description: Sen. Dick Durbin, D-Ill., faced backlash on social media for his post about trans inclusion in women's sports after NCAA President Charlie Baker was grilled on it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gimmicks, not football, dominating college bowl season
item.description: College bowl games are becoming less about football and more about marketing in an ever-changing sports landscape
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bass, NewsNation

item.title: Fruita's Liv Campbell hits 1K point mark as experienced 'Cats are loaded in '24-25
item.description: Coming off a tremendous 19-4 season that saw them earn a top-10 seed in the 6A playoffs, Fruita Monument girls basketball is reloaded this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Aggies lose first game of the season to UCSD, 75-73
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Off to its best start in school history, the Utah State basketball team dropped its first game of the year after ten straight victories, losing at home to UC San Diego Tuesday night, 75-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: The Chicago Bears have no fire in the trenches
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — When it comes to what's wrong with the Chicago Bears, some argue it's coaching. Others dare to say it's Caleb Williams. Most toss it up to organizational dysfunction, or some supernatural hex inadvertently brought about by the McCaskeys being the McCaskeys.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida Gators look to tie a bow on season in Gasparilla Bowl against Tulane
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Union Home Mortgage Gasparilla Bowl hosts the Tulane Green Wave (9-4) representing the American Athletic Conference and the University of Florida Gators (7-5) from the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 84-year-old continues lawn bowling despite vision loss
item.description: On most days, you can find Ralph Trinity rolling with the Oaks North Lawn Bowling Club in Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Rays call for more money after Pinellas commissioners vote in favor of bonds for new stadium
item.description: Pinellas County commissioners voted in favor of approving bonds for the new Tampa Bay Rays stadium Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vucevic scores 24 points as Bulls hold off Raptors 122-121 for 4th win in 6 games
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 24 points, Coby White added 19 and the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Toronto Raptors 122-121 on Monday night for their fourth win in six games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU excited to face Heisman winner Travis Hunter
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - As BYU continues preparation for the Alamo Bowl December 28th against Colorado, they are looking forward to facing off against Heisman Trophy Winner Travis Hunter. Hunter is truly a one-of-a-kind player.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles on team's December rise and a dominating win against the Chargers
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers continued to add pressure in the NFC South title race with a commanding 40-17 win over the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears at Vikings preview: Injury updates, a look into recent matchups, and more
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. (WGN) — The Chicago Bears travel to Minneapolis for Monday Night Football to face a surging Minnesota Vikings team that's won six straight and has a chance to tie the Detroit Lions for the NFC North lead in front of a national audience.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before limping off with an ankle injury in the fourth quarter, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and Kansas City finally had a relatively easy win, 21-7 over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Grant DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head
item.description: Grant DuBose, who returned Sunday after a shoulder injury sidelined him for part of the season, was listed as being in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU gets defensive against Wyoming in 68-49 win
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mawot Mag and Dawson Baker came off the bench and combined for 22 points, sparking BYU men’s basketball to 68-49 win over Wyoming on Saturday night at the Delta Center. "It was a good win," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jack Hughes helps the Devils rally for a 4-1 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jack Hughes scored his 13th goal during a big third period for New Jersey, helping the Devils beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers player refused to enter game when called on, Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter the game when Kyle Shanahan attempted to put him in on Thursday night, Shanahan said. Campbell instead went to the locker room. The incident happened in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Utah shuts down Colorado for fifth straight road victory
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is turning into a team of road warriors. Dylan Guenther scored two goals and an assist to give him a team-leading 12 goals on the season, while Karel Vejmelka made 22 saves, as Utah shut down the Colorado Avalanche Thursday night, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 29 CMU football student-athletes make RMAC All-Academic list
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference unveiled its All-Academic Team for football on Tuesday afternoon. Colorado Mesa University was well-represented, with 29 student-athletes receiving recognition, including five First Team honorees and one major award winner.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
